title: Phase 1: skeleton + contracts
summary: Bootstrap NovaAllocationBot repository structure, safety contracts, and dry-run guardrails.

title: Phase 2: read NovaBotV2 and Options result snapshots read-only
summary: Implement read-only adapters for NovaBotV2 and NovaBotV2Options result_snapshot.json files. No monetary data surfaced externally.

title: Phase 3: market regime input
summary: Connect MarketRegimeBot result_snapshot.json as input to allocation decisions. Regime-aware allocation adjustments — advisory only, no execution.

title: Phase 4: allocation recommendation engine
summary: Fixed 90/10/0/0 advisory allocation split (NovaBotV2/Options/CryptoBot/Reserve). Read-only recommendation. No execution, no money movement.

title: Phase 5: NovaBridge integration
summary: Produce result_snapshot.json consumable by NovaBridge adapter. Surface allocation percentages, status, and dry-run state only.

title: Phase 6: human approval workflow
summary: Design human approval gate for any allocation recommendation change. Document review criteria and sign-off procedure. No execution path.

title: Phase 7: controlled downstream allocation export
summary: FUTURE ONLY — design-only task for eventually exporting allocation recommendations to NovaBotV2. Requires explicit human approval gate. No implementation until Phase 6 complete and human-approved.

title: Allocation recommendation history tracker
summary: Create a time-series log of allocation recommendations. Record timestamp, recommended splits, regime context, and any warnings. Writes to data/reports/allocation_history.json. Read-only analytics.

title: Regime-based allocation evaluation engine
summary: Evaluate allocation split quality under different market regimes. Compare 90/10 split performance in BULL vs BEAR vs NEUTRAL regimes using MarketRegimeBot data. Advisory report only.

title: TacticBot allocation input integration
summary: Read TacticBot strategy-regime recommendations as an input signal for allocation adjustments. TacticBot must be at Phase 12+ before this is actionable. Advisory only, no execution.

title: Allocation drift detection
summary: Detect when actual portfolio composition drifts from recommended allocation. Report drift warnings in result_snapshot.json and dashboard. Read-only — no execution.

title: Guardrails and dry-run audit
summary: Review all dry-run guards, ADVISORY_ONLY flags, and execution prevention mechanisms. Produce audit report. No code changes — documentation only.
